subcodes.first_line: A remembrance for him who hath turned unto God and been illumined by the lights which have shone forth from the horizon of his Lord's will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری لمن اقبل الی الله و استضاء من الانوار التی اشرقت من افق اراده ربه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
